title: C2: Beacon Activity Timeline
description: Shows C2 activity over time across Sysmon DNS/network, VCN Flow, and Network Firewall telemetry. The timeline helps analysts identify recurring callbacks and pivot into the source and destination widgets.
query: (('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' and 'Event ID' = '22' and ('Query Name' like '*.xyz' or 'Query Name' like '*.info' or 'Query Name' like '*.top' or 'Query Name' like '*.pw' or 'Query Name' like '*.cc' or 'Query Name' like '*.tk' or 'Query Name' like '*.bit' or 'Query Name' like '*.duckdns.org' or 'Query Name' like '*.dnsexfil.example')) or (('Log Source' = 'SOC Sysmon Network Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and 'Event ID' = '3' and ('Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*duckdns.org' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*malware.xyz' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*attacker.top' or 'Destination Hostname' like '*cobalt.example.com' or 'Destination Port' = 4443 or 'Destination Port' = 8443)) or (('Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs') and ('Destination IP' = '198.51.100.77' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration'))) | timestats span = 1hour count as C2Events by 'Log Source'

ask_ai_prompts: Identify the first and last C2 beacon windows.
Which log source provides the strongest recurring beacon evidence?
